span.p:
Production, holds confidential data,
or is the Default env?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does every active user hold a premium
per-user license OR does the env have
capacity add-ons allocated?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Enable Managed Environments
set sharing limits + solution-checker enforcement

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Resolve licensing FIRST
then enable — don't trigger surprise compliance notices

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is it a Developer-Plan env where
users run their own assets?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Not entitled on Developer Plan — don't enable

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Optional — weigh per-user license cost
vs governance benefit per env
